name: 2pk Adhesive Spray Bottle Holder - Brightroom™
description:
Organize your kitchen efficiently with this 2-Pack Adhesive Spray Bottle Holder Set from Brightroom™. Made of ABS, this pack includes two holders to provide versatile storage for your spray bottles with convenient adhesive backing that installs easily inside cabinet doors or on walls without the need for tools. The space-saving design keeps bottles within easy reach while freeing up valuable counter and cabinet space, making it perfect for organizing cleaning products in kitchens, bathrooms, or utility areas.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
